title: Yaar intha penthan lyrics - Boss Engira Baskaran song lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Haricharan
Song: Yaar Intha Penthan
Movie: Boss Engira Baskaran
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar

Yaar intha penthan endru ketten munnale
Ival endhan paadhi endru kandaen thannale
Ennai parkiraal edho ketkiral engum irukiralo
Kannal sirikiral munnal nadakiral nenjai kizhikiralo
Kootathil irundhum thaniyaga therindhaal
Thotathil malarndha poovaga thirindhal
Ennai yedho seidhaal...

Yaar intha penthan endru ketten munnale
Ival endhan paadhi endru kandaen thannale

En veetu muttrathil ival podum kolangal
eppodhum vandum endru kettaen
Anil aadum koodathil ival paadum ragathil
adhikalai suriyanai parthaen
Kannadi vazhalayai pole
kaiyodu Naanum pirakkave thodipen
Kaltheendum kozhusil ennoda manasa
Serthu korkave thavippen
kadhodu thavalum kammal polkidapen
Kannathai urasi en jenmam mudipen
ennai yedho seidhaal...

Yaar intha penthan endru ketten munnale
Ival endhan paadhi endru kandaen thannale...

Nan konjam parthaal enjaeyo parpal
parkadha neram ennai parpal
Ennai parthu siripal nan parthal maraipal
meyaaga poiyagathaan nadipaal
Pen nenjam pudhi adhai eppodum
yaarum yaarum arindhadhey illai
Aan nenjin thudipum andrada thavipum
pengal madhipadhey illai
Manam nondha piragae mudhal varthai solval
Mazhai nindra kudai thandhu selval
Ennai yedho seidhaal...

Yaar intha penthan endru ketten munnale
Ival endhan paadhi endru kandaen thannale ...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yaar intha Penthan'?

The song expresses feelings of love and admiration, portraying the emotions of someone infatuated with a special person.

How does this song fit into the plot of 'Boss Engira Baskaran'?

This song highlights the romantic moments in the film, showcasing the protagonist's feelings towards his love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Haricharan and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Yaar intha Penthan' released?

The song was released on August 29, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaar intha Penthan, the protagonist expresses his deep affection for his beloved, capturing the essence of young love. The song beautifully conveys the excitement and nervousness of infatuation, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. With its melodious tune and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes feelings of joy and warmth. This enchanting track is a highlight of the film Boss Engira Baskaran, resonating with anyone who has experienced the thrill of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaar intha Penthan from Boss Engira Baskaran is a delightful romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Haricharan's soulful vocals and Yuvan's enchanting composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Dive into the beautiful lyrics penned by Na Muthukumar that perfectly express the emotions of infatuation and admiration.
stanzaMeanings: I asked who this girl is, and I realized she is my other half. She looks at me and seems to be everywhere, smiling with her eyes, making my heart tremble. Even when she is in a crowd, she stands out like a flower blooming in a garden. If she does something to me...
I asked who this girl is, and I realized she is my other half.

In my house, I heard that she always comes to the corner. I saw her dancing in the group, singing with a rhythm that shines like the sun. Holding my hand like a mirror, I feel like I am born again. My heart is mixed with her heart, and I will not let go of this story. I will not let my eyes forget this life. If she does something to me...
I asked who this girl is, and I realized she is my other half.

If I look at her for a moment, I feel like I am lost in time. When she smiles at me, it feels like everything is a lie. No one knows the truth about my heart. Even when my heart beats, it doesn't matter. When my mind is troubled, I will speak the first words. If she does something to me...
I asked who this girl is, and I realized she is my other half.
